revised_strategy_options.name: league_schedule_ssr_discovery
revised_strategy_options.desc: Probe FotMob league schedule/matchday page (SSR) to enumerate all fixtures and discover correct-orientation route_hash_pairs from full-season data
revised_strategy_options.risk: Requires authorized probe; league page may be large but safe summary extraction works

revised_strategy_options.name: matchup_route_page_discovery
revised_strategy_options.desc: Use same route_code matchup page to see if it lists both legs (home/away) with different hash_ids
revised_strategy_options.risk: May not expose both legs on single page

revised_strategy_options.name: season_schedule_hydration_data
revised_strategy_options.desc: Look for season-level __NEXT_DATA__ that contains all fixtures with full route/hash pairs
revised_strategy_options.risk: Requires finding correct league season page URL

revised_strategy_options.name: manual_canonical_seed
revised_strategy_options.desc: Accept user-provided browser-observed canonical URL examples as manual evidence only, not automated source
revised_strategy_options.risk: Manual process; may still yield reverse fixtures

revised_strategy_options.name: alternate_public_source
revised_strategy_options.desc: Evaluate other public football data sources if FotMob cannot expose correct pairs safely

recommended_next_step: User must select and authorize revised discovery strategy; league_schedule_ssr_discovery recommended; do NOT raw write
